# ViralSidekick

> ViralSidekick is an AI YouTube creator-intelligence tool that reads a channel the way an analyst would. Paste a channel and it pulls every recent upload, flags outliers and dead zones, computes data-driven posting windows, compares the channel to adjacent channels in the same niche, grades the channel from S to F, and writes the next video. A free scan runs in about 30 seconds with no signup. Built by Stromation LLC.

## What it does
- Autopsies a YouTube channel from real public upload data (no channel login required for the free scan)
- Flags outliers: videos that beat the channel's own median views by 2.5x or more
- Flags dead zones: formats and topics that underperform the channel's own median
- Computes the best posting windows from the channel's own top performers, not a generic chart
- Separates YouTube Shorts and long-form as different formats with their own medians
- Compares the channel against adjacent creators erupting in the same niche this week
- Grades the channel S to F (viral readiness) and explains the grade
- Writes the next video: title options, hook, format, and a 30-day roadmap

## Key facts
- Free scan: https://viralsidekick.com/dashboard.html (about 30 seconds, no signup)
- Public channel grade (shareable): https://viralsidekick.com/c.html
- Pro plan: 19 USD per month (blueprints, deeper intel, live pulse)
- Team plan: 29.99 USD per month for up to 5 seats
- Method: real public YouTube data, outlier ratio measured against the channel's own format median (not against other channels)
- Maker: Stromation LLC, https://www.stromation.com

## Core pages
- Home: https://viralsidekick.com/

- Public grade card: https://viralsidekick.com/c.html
- The film (what it is, 60-second explainer): https://viralsidekick.com/film.html

## Guides (creator analytics)
- Why your YouTube videos are not going viral: https://viralsidekick.com/guides/why-youtube-videos-arent-going-viral.html
- Best time to post on YouTube (from your own data): https://viralsidekick.com/guides/best-time-to-post-on-youtube.html
- How to read your YouTube outliers: https://viralsidekick.com/guides/how-to-read-youtube-outliers.html
- YouTube Shorts vs long-form, compared correctly: https://viralsidekick.com/guides/youtube-shorts-vs-long-form.html
- All guides: https://viralsidekick.com/guides.html

## Answers to common questions
- Is the scan free? Yes, a full channel scan is free and needs no signup.
- Does it need access to my YouTube account? No, the free scan reads public data only.
- What is an outlier? A video that beats the channel's own median views by 2.5x or more.
- Why separate Shorts and long-form? A Short counts a view on start via the swipe feed, long-form is CTR plus retention plus session time, so each is judged against its own median.
